_meta.description: Domain architecture map for HESEM QMS Portal aligned to SAP, Epicor, IFS, Oracle, and Dynamics patterns.

focus: QM integration with MM, PP, SD, PM

sap_s4hana.namingConvention: Short, stable technical table names with language text tables and status profiles.
sap_s4hana.linkPattern: Normalized transactional model with strong integration across logistics and finance objects.
sap_s4hana.auditPattern: System status, user status, change documents, and language-dependent text tables.
sap_s4hana.multilingualPattern: Text tables keyed by language and often by business object key.

epicor_kinetic.namingConvention: Business-object naming around parts, jobs, operations, suppliers, and order flows.
epicor_kinetic.linkPattern: Normalized operational entities with execution and traceability records around job/part flow.
epicor_kinetic.auditPattern: Execution history, operator trace, and approval records around shop-floor objects.
epicor_kinetic.multilingualPattern: Localized UI metadata with business-object centric labels rather than text-table-heavy design.

ifs_cloud.namingConvention: Bounded logical units exposed via projections that implement defined business functions.
ifs_cloud.linkPattern: DDD-like logical units and projections instead of a monolithic API surface.
ifs_cloud.auditPattern: Persistent custom attributes on logical units plus permissioned projection access.
ifs_cloud.multilingualPattern: Translation Manager and field-description translations over logical units and custom objects.

oracle_fusion.namingConvention: Business objects backed by base tables, translation tables (_TL), and extensible flexfields.
oracle_fusion.linkPattern: Business-object-centric normalized core with WHO columns and translation tables.
oracle_fusion.auditPattern: WHO columns such as CREATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, LAST_UPDATE_DATE.
oracle_fusion.multilingualPattern: Translation tables keyed by LANGUAGE and SOURCE_LANG for translatable attributes.

dynamics_365.linkPattern: Metadata-driven tables with lookup columns and optional virtual-table federation.
dynamics_365.auditPattern: CreatedBy, CreatedOn, ModifiedBy, ModifiedOn as standard system-managed fields.
dynamics_365.multilingualPattern: LocalizedLabels on metadata objects and label merge semantics by language code.

core_system.label: Hệ thống lõi
core_system.description: Người dùng, vai trò, phiên, tổ chức và nhật ký hệ thống lõi.
core_system.businessProcess: Identity, authorization, tenancy, security, and audit foundation.

foundation_governance.label: Nền tảng và governance
foundation_governance.description: Cấu trúc tổ chức, party, UOM, lịch, mã chuẩn, approval, e-signature và attachment nền tảng.
foundation_governance.businessProcess: Enterprise structure, identity-bearing party master, governed codes, approvals, and compliant signatures.

document_control.label: Kiểm soát tài liệu
document_control.description: Tài liệu có kiểm soát, phiên bản, phân phối và xác nhận đọc.
document_control.businessProcess: Controlled documents, revisions, release, acknowledgment, and retrieval.

master_data.label: Dữ liệu chủ
master_data.description: Mã hàng, BOM, routing, work center và revision chuẩn sản xuất.
master_data.businessProcess: Item, BOM, routing, work center, and revision master governance.

sales.label: Bán hàng
sales.description: Khách hàng, đơn hàng bán, line và cộng tác thực hiện đơn.
sales.businessProcess: Quote-to-order, order promising, contract review, and customer delivery commitments.

purchasing.label: Mua hàng
purchasing.description: Nhà cung cấp, PO, line, đánh giá và nguồn cung.
purchasing.businessProcess: Source-to-order, supplier evaluation, approval, and procurement control.

inventory.label: Tồn kho
inventory.description: Kho, vị trí, lô, serial và giao dịch tồn kho nền tảng.
inventory.businessProcess: Inventory receiving, stocking, lot/serial traceability, and stock movement.

production.label: Sản xuất
production.description: JO, công đoạn, lao động, lịch và điều độ xưởng.
production.businessProcess: Plan-to-produce, execution dispatching, labor collection, and shift performance.

quality_management.label: Quản lý chất lượng
quality_management.description: Kiểm tra, NCR, CAPA, FAI, SPC, OQC và chất lượng vận hành.
quality_management.businessProcess: Inspection, nonconformance, CAPA, first article, SPC, and containment.

calibration_equipment.label: Hiệu chuẩn và thiết bị
calibration_equipment.description: Thiết bị, hiệu chuẩn, bảo trì cơ bản và dao dụng cụ nền tảng.
calibration_equipment.businessProcess: Calibration scheduling, equipment control, and baseline tooling records.

audit_risk.label: Đánh giá và rủi ro
audit_risk.description: Đánh giá, phát hiện, hành động, rủi ro và cải tiến.
audit_risk.businessProcess: Audit planning, findings, action closure, management review, and risk tracking.

training_hr.label: Đào tạo và nhân sự
training_hr.description: Hồ sơ nhân viên, đào tạo, kỹ năng và chứng chỉ nền tảng.
training_hr.businessProcess: Competency, certification, and personnel qualification baseline.

finance.label: Tài chính
finance.description: Giá thành, GL, AP/AR và nghiệp vụ tài chính lõi.
finance.businessProcess: Costing, accounting, invoicing, and financial transaction control.

shipping_compliance.label: Giao hàng và tuân thủ
shipping_compliance.description: Lô giao, kiện hàng, release giao và hồ sơ tuân thủ xuất hàng.
shipping_compliance.businessProcess: Shipment preparation, compliance release, export documentation, and customer release.

mes_execution.label: MES thực thi
mes_execution.description: MES shopfloor gồm core, execution, telemetry, inline quality, material, integration và analytics.
mes_execution.businessProcess: Machine connectivity, execution tracking, telemetry, inline quality, genealogy, and OEE.

plant_maintenance.label: Bảo trì nhà máy
plant_maintenance.description: CMMS/EAM cho thiết bị, kế hoạch PM, WO, failure và reliability.
plant_maintenance.businessProcess: Preventive, corrective, condition-based maintenance and reliability management.

advanced_planning.label: Hoạch định nâng cao
advanced_planning.description: APS, finite capacity scheduling, scenarios và pegging.
advanced_planning.businessProcess: Scenario planning, finite scheduling, capacity balancing, and pegging.

plm_change_control.label: PLM và thay đổi kỹ thuật
plm_change_control.description: ECR/ECO, review board, yêu cầu, test plan và deviation permit.
plm_change_control.businessProcess: Engineering change, configuration control, design validation, and product traceability.

hcm_workforce.label: Nhân lực mở rộng
hcm_workforce.description: Cơ cấu tổ chức, vị trí, kỹ năng, chứng chỉ, chấm công và payroll.
hcm_workforce.businessProcess: Workforce structure, qualifications, attendance, and payroll.

warehouse_management.label: Quản lý kho nâng cao
warehouse_management.description: Zone, bin, transfer order, putaway, pick list, cycle count và HU.
warehouse_management.businessProcess: Putaway, bin control, picking, cycle counting, quarantine, and handling units.

finance_extended.label: Tài chính thương mại mở rộng
finance_extended.description: Tiền tệ, tỷ giá, customs declarations, LC và thuế quốc gia.
finance_extended.businessProcess: Multi-currency, trade finance, customs, FX, and tax profile control.

project_management.label: Quản lý dự án
project_management.description: Project, WBS, milestone, time, cost, earned value và change request.
project_management.businessProcess: Project execution, milestone billing, earned value, and project risk/change governance.

crm.label: CRM
crm.description: Account, contact, lead, opportunity, campaign và forecast.
crm.businessProcess: Lead-to-opportunity, customer engagement, and pipeline forecasting.

transportation.label: Vận tải
transportation.description: Carrier, route, shipment line, customs docs, freight audit và delivery events.
transportation.businessProcess: Freight planning, routing, customs documents, export screening, and proof of delivery.

bi_datawarehouse.label: BI và kho dữ liệu
bi_datawarehouse.description: Dimension, fact, ETL run, KPI snapshots và semantic analytics.
bi_datawarehouse.businessProcess: Dimensional analytics, KPI scorecards, and ETL orchestration.

supplier_relationship.label: Quan hệ nhà cung cấp
supplier_relationship.description: Supplier quality, sourcing, bids, portal, development plan và VMI.
supplier_relationship.businessProcess: Supplier onboarding, quality, sourcing, collaboration, and performance improvement.

tooling_lifecycle.label: Vòng đời tooling
tooling_lifecycle.description: Tooling family, preset, kit, life limits, regrind, fixture lifecycle.
tooling_lifecycle.businessProcess: Tool crib, presetting, tool life control, fixture maintenance, and assembly kits.

demand_supply_planning.label: Cân đối cung cầu
demand_supply_planning.description: S&OP, demand consensus, supply consensus, buffer và replenishment policies.
demand_supply_planning.businessProcess: Demand consensus, supply consensus, replenishment, and inventory policy management.

service_warranty.label: Dịch vụ và bảo hành
service_warranty.description: Installed base, contract, warranty claim, RMA, service request và field visit.
service_warranty.businessProcess: Installed-base service, warranty claims, returns, and service work execution.

finance_treasury.label: Ngân quỹ và tài sản
finance_treasury.description: Standard cost, budget, fixed asset, cash, bank reconciliation và revenue schedule.
finance_treasury.businessProcess: Treasury, budgets, fixed assets, cash management, and revenue scheduling.

quality_lab.label: Phòng lab chất lượng
quality_lab.description: Phương pháp thử, sample, chứng nhận, obligation, escape, containment và FA package.
quality_lab.businessProcess: Laboratory test governance, compliance evidence, escape containment, and effectiveness review.

ehs_sustainability.label: EHS và phát triển bền vững
ehs_sustainability.description: Permit, hazardous material, PPE, waste, emissions và sustainability projects.
ehs_sustainability.businessProcess: EHS compliance, waste/emissions reporting, contractor safety, and sustainability actions.

mfg_engineering.label: Kỹ thuật sản xuất
mfg_engineering.description: Process family, standard operations, time standards, instructions và calendars.
mfg_engineering.businessProcess: Industrialization, standard work, time standards, and engineering readiness.

master_data_governance.label: Quản trị dữ liệu chủ
master_data_governance.description: Item class, attributes, reference codes, site params, number series và stewardship.
master_data_governance.businessProcess: Stewardship, number series, duplicate control, and MDM issue resolution.

commercial_contracts.label: Thương mại và hợp đồng
commercial_contracts.description: Contract, price list, rebate, incoterms, credit profile và order promises.
commercial_contracts.businessProcess: Contract governance, pricing, rebates, commercial scorecards, and promise management.

traceability_serialization.label: Truy xuất và serialization
traceability_serialization.description: Genealogy, serial events, lot attributes, travelers, labels và recall.
traceability_serialization.businessProcess: Lot/serial genealogy, traveler control, labeling, and recall execution.

outsource_execution.label: Gia công ngoài
outsource_execution.description: Subcontract plan, dispatch batch, receipt, chargeback, recovery và supplier execution.
outsource_execution.businessProcess: Outside processing planning, dispatch, receipt, recovery, and supplier performance.

trade_compliance.label: Tuân thủ thương mại
trade_compliance.description: ECCN, screening, end use, preference program, drawbacks và audits.
trade_compliance.businessProcess: Export control, screening, broker management, duty recovery, and compliance audit.

forms_system.label: Hệ thống biểu mẫu
forms_system.description: Schema biểu mẫu, entry và attachment runtime.
forms_system.businessProcess: Schema-driven form publishing, submission, approval, and attachment capture.

record_system.label: Hệ thống hồ sơ
record_system.description: Counter, hồ sơ và liên kết hồ sơ dùng chung toàn portal.
record_system.businessProcess: Record numbering, lifecycle governance, and cross-record linkage.

system_infrastructure.label: Hạ tầng hệ thống
system_infrastructure.description: Biến hệ thống, naming, file, tag, comment, notification và workflow runtime.
system_infrastructure.businessProcess: Infrastructure, metadata, notification, workflow runtime, and system-level services.

customer_portal.label: Cổng khách hàng
customer_portal.description: Portal user, session, token, order view, complaint submission và access.
customer_portal.businessProcess: External customer visibility, complaint intake, and secure portal access.

evidence_vault.label: Kho bằng chứng
evidence_vault.description: Evidence, chain-of-custody, links và full-text search.
evidence_vault.businessProcess: Evidence retention, chain of custody, indexing, and audit support.

cnc_programs.label: Chương trình CNC
cnc_programs.description: Program, version, approval, setup sheet và item setup.
cnc_programs.businessProcess: NC program version control, approval, and setup-sheet release.

digital_product_passport.label: Hộ chiếu sản phẩm số
digital_product_passport.description: Passport, event và access log cho vòng đời sản phẩm.
digital_product_passport.businessProcess: Passport issuance, event trace, and controlled downstream access.

ai_predictive.label: AI dự báo
ai_predictive.description: Prediction models, quality predictions, anomaly rules và AI scheduling signals.
ai_predictive.businessProcess: Predictive quality, anomaly detection, and AI-assisted planning decisions.

fmea_apqp.label: FMEA và APQP
fmea_apqp.description: FMEA, action, revision, control plan, APQP và PPAP.
fmea_apqp.businessProcess: Risk analysis, control planning, APQP phase gates, and PPAP readiness.

mobile_operations.label: Vận hành di động
mobile_operations.description: Shopfloor mobile queue, time entry và capture kiểm tra hiện trường.
mobile_operations.businessProcess: Mobile task execution, labor capture, and inline inspection collection.

lean_manufacturing.label: Lean Manufacturing
lean_manufacturing.description: Kaizen, QRQC, Andon, 5S, Gemba, SMED va tier meeting cho world-class shopfloor.
lean_manufacturing.businessProcess: Continuous improvement, rapid response, visual management, layered audits, and lean execution discipline.
